# Hypocenter

**Summary**: The point of origin of an earthquake or other seismic event.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-suleymanli|Suleymanli, 2023]] focused on the localization of the hypocenter as a critical prerequisite for studying seismic activation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-suleymanli|Suleymanli, 2023]] Accurate hypocenter location is essential for monitoring induced seismicity in geothermal and fracking operations.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-suleymanli|Suleymanli, 2023]] determined by finding the minimum value of the predicted travel time field.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The FNO-based framework successfully localized hypocenters in both synthetic and real data. ([[2023-suleymanli|Suleymanli, 2023, p. 15]])
